posts.author: Kelderic (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am using the new GitHub integration, and right now, I have to open GitHub separately, add the Id of the monday board item somewhere in the text field of the GitHub issue, and that links them.

I’d like to be able to create a column that by default is a button, which creates a linked GitHub issue, and then afterwards, the button just opens the linked issue.
